title: tilia rotundifolia
intro: Tilia rotundifolia, also known as small-leaved lime or round-leaved lime, is a deciduous tree species within the Tilia genus. The medicinal properties of Tilia rotundifolia are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Tilia rotundifolia include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Tilia rotundifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
